goal_text:

You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'stazione restaurant and coffee bar'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
